calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2024 Continued To Apr-30-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Declaration Of Pak Ling Yip In Support Of Request To Enter Judgment By Default Against Defendants Cafe X Technologies, Inc., A Delaware Corporation, And Henry Hu
Off Calendar Mar-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against defendant Cafe X Technologies, Inc., a Delaware corporation and Defendant Henry Hu.

Dept.:505: Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:46:53 a.m. and concluding at 10:04:47 a.m.(D505)

Tony Cho-On Hoh, Esq. representing Plaintiff Pak Ling Yip, Trustee of the Pak Ling and Sau Fun Yip Revocable Trust.
Plaintiff Pak Ling Yip was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Cafe X Technologies, Inc., a Delaware corporation not appearing.
Defendant Henry Hu not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract filed Feb-09-2022.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Cafe X Technologies and Defendant Henry Hu mailed Feb-17-2022; service effectuated on Feb-28-2022.
Default entered as to Defendant Cafe X Tech on Jul-05-2022.
Default entered as to Defendant Henry Hu on Nov-23-2022.
Dismissal of Does 1 through 10 inclusive on Dec-14-2023.
Motion for Default Judgment filed on Dec-14-2023.

Counsel to provide summary of causes of action and to make a record of the amount prayed for.
Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Supplemental declaration of Atty. Tony C. Hoh
Exhibit 2: Lease Agreement
Court addresses Plaintiff and confirms that testimony, declarations made, and exhibits submitted are true and correct.

After hearing the testimony, reviewing the declaration and evidence, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant the following:
Damages $151,673.41
Interest $30,015.74
Attorney's Fees $18,945.00
Costs $725.34
Total Judgment $201,359.49

The Court modifies the proposed judgment according to proof.

Modified proposed judgment is signed and executed this day.

Declaration Of Pak Ling Yip In Support Of Request To Enter Judgment By Default Against Defendants Cafe X Technologies, Inc., A Delaware Corporation, And Henry Hu
